title: Low-End NeoForge
description: Starter Low-end PC Modpack for NeoForge!
body:
# Starter Low-End PC Modpack for NeoForge

Are you struggling to run Neoforge Minecraft mods on your 2013 low-end potato PC? This modpack is meticulously ***crafted*** to optimize performance and provide a smooth gameplay experience on older hardware. __**Use this as a model to run NeoForge mods on your potato PC.**__

![bad pc](https://www.digitaltrends.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/11/hotwheelspc.jpg)

### Key Features:

- **Performance Optimization**: Integrates mods that enhance gameplay efficiency and reduce system load, ensuring stable FPS even on low-end machines.
- **Essential Enhancements**: Includes quality-of-life improvements that add essential features without compromising performance.

### Included Mods and Tools:

- **Lightweight Mods**: Selected mods like Embeddium, Dynamic FPS, and BadOptimizations to optimize rendering, lighting, and client performance.
- **Optimization Tools**: Incorporates tools such as FerriteCore and Ksyxis to enhance memory management and graphical performance.

### Technical Advantages:

- **Low Resource Consumption**: Ensures minimal CPU and RAM usage, tailored for systems with limited resources.
- **Improved Performance**: Enhances chunk loading and reduces lag spikes through advanced optimization techniques.

### Why Choose This Modpack?

- **Optimized for Low-End PCs**: Perfectly tailored for older hardware, guaranteeing a smoother and more enjoyable Minecraft experience. 
- **Model for NeoForge Mods**: Serves as an ideal foundation for building and running NeoForge mods on low-end PCs, simplifying the setup process & reducing the amount of crashes.

---

Revitalize your old PC with this optimized modpack and enjoy a seamless Minecraft experience without the performance issues while playing your best mods on Neoforge!
